name: Mom's Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in oil and season with salt.
2. Add the tomato sauce to the pan and cook until heated through.
3. Cook the twisty noodles according to package instructions.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the cream cheese, sour cream, cottage cheese, and chopped green onion.
5. Grease a casserole dish.
6. Layer the cooked noodles, cheese mixture, and meat in the dish.
7. Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of meat on top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Serve 10 portions.
